Please note that we have recently received your compensation details (including benefits provided to you during your STA overseas) and are currently preparing your 2022/23 Employer’s Return (Form IR56B). As soon as it is completed and approved, we will arrange to prepare your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return accordingly. 

As you may also be aware that you may be eligible to claim tax credit in your 2022/23 tax return as you are subject to income tax in China, we will need to coordinate with our China tax team regarding your China tax paid and it would take longer time for us to prepare your tax return.

please check grammar

Please note that we have recently received your compensation details (including benefits provided to you during your STA overseas) and are currently preparing your 2022/23 Employer's Return (Form IR56B). As soon as it is completed and approved, we will arrange to prepare your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return accordingly.

As you may also be aware, you may be eligible to claim a tax credit in your 2022/23 tax return as you are subject to income tax in China. We will need to coordinate with our China tax team regarding your China tax paid, and it may take longer to prepare your tax return as a result.

Please note that we have recently received your compensation details (including benefits provided to you during your STA overseas) and are currently preparing your 2022/23 Employer’s Return (Form IR56B). As soon as it is completed and approved, we will arrange to prepare your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return accordingly.

As you may also be aware, you may be eligible to claim a tax credit in your 2022/23 tax return as you are subject to income tax in China. We will need to coordinate with our China tax team regarding your China tax paid, and it may take longer to prepare your tax return as a result. We will keep you posted for the process.

Please note that we have recently received your compensation details (including benefits provided to you during your stay overseas) and are currently preparing your 2022/23 Employer's Return (Form IR56B). Once it is completed and approved, we will proceed to prepare your 2022/23 Individual Tax Return accordingly.

Additionally, please be aware that you may be eligible to claim a tax credit in your 2022/23 tax return as you are subject to income tax in China. To ensure accuracy, we will need to collaborate with our China tax team regarding the taxes paid in China, which may extend the time needed to finalize your tax return. We will keep you informed of any developments throughout the process. Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your reply.

Well noted on the additional information in respect of your wife (i.e. did not have any employment income during 2022/23) and your son (i.e. dropped out from university before 2022 Christmas). If you have completed your AboutMe, please submit it on our portal. We will then review the information provided and let you know if further information is needed.

Thank you for your response.

We have taken note of the additional information regarding your wife (i.e., no employment income during 2022/23) and your son (i.e., dropped out from university before Christmas 2022). If you have already completed your AboutMe, kindly submit it through our portal. Our team will review the information provided and inform you if any further details are required.

Thank you for your reply. 

Please also provide your HKID card number as it will be quoted in the tax representative letter before submission to the Inland Revenue Department.

Thank you for your message.

We kindly request that you provide your HKID card number, as it will be referenced in the tax representative letter prior to its submission to the Inland Revenue Department. Your cooperation in providing this information will help facilitate the process.

Please also provide your HKID card number as it will be quoted in the tax representative letter before submission to the Inland Revenue Department.

To proceed with the tax representative letter's preparation, kindly provide your HKID card number. This information is necessary as it will be quoted in the letter before it is submitted to the Inland Revenue Department. Your cooperation in providing this detail will enable us to proceed with the submission smoothly.

Please also note that we have applied extension for filing your tax return until August 3, 2023. If additional time is required, we will apply for further extension accordingly.
